head_commit.message:
Add compile-time per-module log prefix via __log_prefix!()

Extend the logging system with compile-time log prefixes that can
be configured per module. Each module can define a `__log_prefix`
function (via the `__log_prefix!()` macro) to prepend contextual
information to log messages, such as "[IOMMU]", "[Virtio]", etc.

Changes:
- Add `prefix` field to `Record` for carrying per-message prefixes
- Extend `log!` macro to capture module-level `__log_prefix` if defined
- Add `__log_prefix!()` convenience macro for declaring prefixes
- Migrate existing manual bracket prefixes to use the new system
- Convert fadvise64 warn! calls to warn_once! for cleaner output

run.display_title: Add compile-time per-module log prefix

steps.name: Check API docs of crates to publish
Check API docs of all crates

run.name: Publish website
